category_sources: source_facts.description says cddlib implements the double description method for polyhedral cones; official GitHub README describes polyhedra conversion and linear programming.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cddlib; official repository title is cddlib/cddlib.
docs_sources: Official repository README has a Documentation section; the cddlib reference manual is hosted under the author/homepage domain from source_facts.homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provided as https://github.com/cddlib/cddlib; per instruction, repo returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists CLI tools; official GitHub README topics and description identify library, polyhedra, linear-programming, and mathematics.
